headline: GM Is Cranking Up U.S. Investments Again. This Time, It's Great News.
summary: Investors are wary of major investment costs after GM's massive EV write-offs over the past year -- but this time, it involves its most important products, which carry less uncertainty.

raw.headline: GM Is Cranking Up U.S. Investments Again. This Time, It's Great News.
raw.summary: Investors are wary of major investment costs after GM's massive EV write-offs over the past year -- but this time, it involves its most important products, which carry less uncertainty.

headline: HARMAN Named 2025 Supplier of the Year by General Motors
summary: NOVI, Mich., May 20, 2026--HARMAN, the automotive technology leader and a subsidiary of Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd., has been named a 2025 Supplier of the Year by General Motors at GM’s 34th annual Supplier of the Year event in Austin, Texas. HARMAN was recognized in the Audio Visual Information Systems (AVIS) Creativity Team category for its innovation and execution.

raw.headline: HARMAN Named 2025 Supplier of the Year by General Motors

HARMAN was recognized in the Audio Visual Information Systems (AVIS) Creativity Team category for its innovation and execution.

headline: Dolby Recognized as 2025 Supplier of the Year and Overdrive Award Winner by General Motors
summary: Dolby Laboratories (NYSE: DLB), a leader in immersive entertainment, has earned two of the automotive industry's most prestigious supplier honors from General Motors: the 2025 Supplier of the Year and the Overdrive Award — GM's highest supplier recognition. It marks the first time Dolby has received either distinction, a milestone that reflects the company's leadership in redefining the in-car entertainment experience through innovations like Dolby Atmos.

raw.headline: Dolby Recognized as 2025 Supplier of the Year and Overdrive Award Winner by General Motors

headline: Lear Wins 2025 GM Supplier of the Year Awards for Seating and E-Systems
summary: Lear Corporation (NYSE: LEA), a global automotive technology leader in Seating and E-Systems, today announced that both its business segments received a 2025 GM Supplier of the Year Award during General Motors' annual Supplier of the Year ceremony. Since this recognition began in 1992, Lear has been awarded 25 total GM Supplier of the Year and Overdrive Awards, including this year's.

Since this recognition began in 1992, Lear has been awarded 25 total GM Supplier of the Year and Overdrive Awards, including this year's.

headline: GM to shift some production from Asia to Mexico from 2027
summary: It is intended to bring annual domestic vehicle output to 80,000 units by 2030 – all of which are currently imported.

headline: More car buyers are shifting to EVs — but the reasons why are nuanced
summary: Trade in data from Edmunds shows more car buyers are choosing EVs, as fuel prices spike. But other factors might be holding back demand.

raw.headline: More car buyers are shifting to EVs — but the reasons why are nuanced

headline: Henry Ford Upped Wages So Workers Became Consumers. The Rest Is History.
summary: The solution to Henry Ford’s problems was unconventional, even radical.  “New Industrial Era Is Marked by Ford’s Shares to Laborers,” the Detroit Free-Press wrote Jan. 6, 1914, after the  Ford Motor  doubled its minimum wage to $5 a day (about $165 today), from $2.34.  The “Five-Dollar Day”—part publicity stunt, part ruthless business tactic—jump-started a consumer revolution that drove the U.S. economy to 20th-century global dominance and still powers it today.
